wikipedia tag in an outdated form for removal
wikipedia tag in outdated form (['wikipedia:en']), with wikipedia and wikidata tag present and may be safely removed
California - an affected OSM element that may be improved

wikipedia tag in outdated form (['wikipedia:es']), with wikipedia and wikidata tag present and may be safely removed
Rocket Lab HQ - an affected OSM element that may be improved

overpass query usable in JOSM that will load all objects where this specific eror is present:
[out:xml][timeout:3600]; ( relation(1343387)['wikidata'='Q1654766']['wikipedia'='es:California (Santander)']['wikipedia:en'='California,_Santander']; way(269313395)['wikidata'='Q116319']['wikipedia'='en:Rocket Lab']['wikipedia:es'='Rocket Lab']; ); (._;>;); out meta qt;//['wikipedia tag in an outdated form for removal']


wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikidata redirect
wikidata and wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because wikidata tag points to a redirect that should be followed
Q30682160 vs Q1865753
Little Portugal - an affected OSM element that may be improved

Q5352151 vs Q49486256
El Sereno Open Space Preserve - an affected OSM element that may be improved

Q5352151 vs Q49486256
El Sereno Open Space Preserve (Closed areas) - an affected OSM element that may be improved

Q3565405 vs Q1654943
NASA Crows Landing Airport - an affected OSM element that may be improved

overpass query usable in JOSM that will load all objects where this specific eror is present:
[out:xml][timeout:3600]; ( node(3700417490)['wikidata'='Q30682160']['wikipedia'='en:Little Portugal, San Jose']; relation(193016)['wikidata'='Q5352151']['wikipedia'='en:El Sereno Open Space Preserve']; relation(4269605)['wikidata'='Q5352151']['wikipedia'='en:El Sereno Open Space Preserve']; way(133346005)['wikidata'='Q3565405']['wikipedia'='en:NASA Crows Landing Airport']; ); (._;>;); out meta qt;//['wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikidata redirect']
